---
title: "Feature Engineering - Final Project"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# 1. Loading Packages.

```{r}
#| label: Nasa Power
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(nasapower)
library(sf)
library(tidymodels)
library(USAboundaries)
```

# 2. Pulling Weather Data.

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false



```
